data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for auto-start settings, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific setting. The linked use case mentions various features related to Zoom integration but does not explicitly confirm whether the auto-start setting is implemented or functioning as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: Auto-start settings (host must join first) not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
